title: Eva merch
wikitext:
[]: Eva merch             Quote Post by MAGI_01 » Tue Dec 04, 2012 10:23 pm Besides my Nerv emblem shirt that I've had for years I have next to nothing as far as merch go's. I have been looking for a decent/reputable place to buy more stuff online but I can't seem to find much if any at all. It would just be so much easier if the Eva store would ship internationally.... Can any of you guys kinda point me in the right direction, if possible?

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Tue Dec 04, 2012 10:29 pm I'd really suggest ebay as your best bet, unfortunately.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI_01 » Wed Dec 05, 2012 1:42 am Well that's better than nothing at all. I have had some pretty good success with ebay in the past. I just wish there were some better options (

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Wed Dec 05, 2012 2:07 am MAGI_01 wrote: Well that's better than nothing at all. I have had some pretty good success with ebay in the past. I just wish there were some better options (

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Dec 05, 2012 5:55 am There's a couple of places from this thread: http://forum.evageeks.org/post/441220/Where-to-buy-Revoltech-figures/ essentially: Amazon.co.jp CDJapan PlayAsia Amiami YesAsia Hobbysearch

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Wed Dec 05, 2012 11:04 am All Eva merch at Rightstuf is currently being sold at below retail. However it is practically all US domestic releases so no Q goodies there. JList, which is based in Japan, updates daily and has lately been getting a lot of Q merch. However depending on how popular an item is it can sell out quickly and they might not restock it. Still waiting for them to do this with the latest 6 pack of Eva themed UCC Coffee because I waited a couple days too long before deciding to pull the trigger and missed the window. They are one of the few sites that I'm aware of that sells anime tie-in food items. I also like Robert's Anime Corner Store although I haven't ordered from them in a while.

[]:             Quote Post by MAGI_01 » Wed Dec 05, 2012 2:48 pm Alright thanks! I'll look into all of those those later today when I have some time.
